_meta.purpose: OHLCV relationship families for the golden-calibration search policy (docs/GOLDEN_CALIBRATION_FEATURE_SEARCH.md §3-4). Groups the 42 searchable ids (OPTIONAL 101-123, XAS 130-131, PROPOSED 501+) by mathematical meaning. The search evaluates per family, keeps the simplest one-SE plateau representative, and orders the greedy pool by family. Part of lstm_recipe_hash: editing this map = a new search epoch. New PROPOSED features must be added here by the worker at registration (family comes from the agent's proposal contract).
_meta.scope: searchable ids only (CORE 1-13 is always on and never searched)
